Justification.Explanation: LL-9.xml content has not been provided. A formal verification of LL-9 refinements, dependencies, and traceability cannot be performed without the actual LL-9 content. The next step is to supply LL-9.xml (or paste its contents) so I can generate the corresponding findings and implementations and complete traceability validation (including LL-LOC-7.1 interactions and naming propagation).

Implementation.Solution: <Requirement ID="LL-9-PLACEHOLDER-1"> <Type>FR</Type> <Name>Placeholder for LL-9 content</Name> <Relationships/> <Content>LL-9 content to be provided by you. This placeholder exists to document that LL-9 analysis cannot proceed until LL-9 content is available.</Content> </Requirement>

Justification.Explanation: High-Level Requirement HL-MAP-2.2 currently uses the misspelled name "Cell Clasification." This spelling discrepancy affects traceability, reviews, and tooling consistency across HL and LL documents. Aligning the name to "Cell Classification" is required to maintain traceability integrity across levels.

Implementation.Solution:
<Requirement ID="HL-MAP-2.2"> <Type>FR</Type> <Name>Cell Classification</Name> <Content>Robot shall distinguish between free, blocked, and unknown areas</Content> <Relationships/> </Requirement>
<!-- Propagate the corrected HL name to LL where referenced; LL-MAP-2.2 should align with HL's corrected name. -->

Justification.Explanation: LL-LOC-7.1 showed potential redundancy by having both a DependsOn to LL-EXPL-1.1 and a Refines to HL-EXPL-1.1. To maintain a clean, acyclic traceability graph, remove the redundant DependsOn and keep a single, coherent refinement/dependency pattern.

Implementation.Solution: <Requirement ID="LL-LOC-7.1"> <Type>FR</Type> <Name>Localization and Pose Estimation</Name> <Relationships> <Refines>HL-EXPL-1.1</Refines> <DependsOn>LL-EXPL-1.2</DependsOn> <DependsOn>LL-INTERF-6.1</DependsOn> <DependsOn>LL-MAP-2.1</DependsOn> </Relationships> <Content>Robot shall estimate its pose in the environment using sensor fusion and provide pose with uncertainty; Pose updates shall be integrated into the map and planning modules.</Content> </Requirement>

Justification.Explanation: Consistency between HL and LL naming for Cell Classification should be maintained. HL currently uses a misspelled name; aligning HL naming with LL and propagating the corrected term will prevent future traceability issues.

Implementation.Solution:
<Requirement ID="HL-MAP-2.2"> <Type>FR</Type> <Name>Cell Classification</Name> <Content>Robot shall distinguish between free, blocked, and unknown areas</Content> <Relationships/> </Requirement>
<!-- LL references should remain aligned with the corrected HL name. Ensure LL-MAP-2.2 uses the refined HL name or adjust accordingly to preserve traceability. -->
